summary: Spot preflight validation evidence for Issue #32

live_spot_capacity_result.description: Real EKS cluster sparkpilot-live-1 has 1 nodegroup with no Spot capacity configured

checks.message: No Spot-capable managed node groups were found; workloads may run on on-demand capacity only.
checks.remediation: Configure at least one Spot-capable node group or Karpenter NodePool for executor workloads.

checks.message: Spot diversification check skipped because no Spot-capable managed node groups were found.
checks.remediation: Add Spot-capable node groups or Karpenter Spot NodePools with diversified instance type requirements.

test_no_spot_conf.description: Executor spark conf missing spot selectors entirely

result.message: Executor Spark configuration does not include a Spot node selector.
result.remediation: Set executor node selector Spark config such as `spark.kubernetes.executor.node.selector.eks.amazonaws.com/capacityType=SPOT` or `spark.kubernetes.executor.node.selector.karpenter.sh/capacity-type=spot`.

test_spot_selector_no_toleration.description: Executor has spot selector but missing toleration — partial config that still produces warning

result.message: Executor Spark configuration has Spot node selectors but no Spot toleration hints.
result.remediation: Add executor Spot tolerations (for example `spark.kubernetes.executor.tolerations`) to improve placement on tainted Spot pools.

test_full_spot_config_pass.description: Full spot config — selector + toleration — passes

result.message: Executor Spark configuration includes Spot node selectors and toleration hints.

blocking_behavior_note: Spot checks currently produce 'warning' status, not 'fail'. Warnings are surfaced in the preflight response and logged as audit events. When environment.status is 'provisioning', the check code=environment.status returns status=fail and blocks dispatch. For environments in 'ready' state with no spot capacity, the warning is surfaced to the operator but dispatch is not hard-blocked — consistent with the design for graceful degradation to on-demand.

issue_32_acceptance_criteria_coverage.validate_spot_nodegroups: PASS — live check confirmed: 1 nodegroup, 0 are Spot-capable, warning returned
issue_32_acceptance_criteria_coverage.validate_spot_diversification: PASS — diversification check skips gracefully when no spot nodegroups found
issue_32_acceptance_criteria_coverage.warn_on_demand_only: PASS — warning message: 'workloads may run on on-demand capacity only'
issue_32_acceptance_criteria_coverage.validate_executor_pod_templates: PASS — spark_conf checks validate selector + toleration presence
issue_32_acceptance_criteria_coverage.remediation_strings: PASS — all warning checks include remediation strings
issue_32_acceptance_criteria_coverage.unit_tests: PARTIAL — preflight_byoc unit test cases documented here; test suite TBD
issue_32_acceptance_criteria_coverage.real_eks_integration_test: PASS — live check run against sparkpilot-live-1
